title: Cloud VoIP vs PBX
description: Compare cloud-hosted business phone service with PBX-style systems.
winnerSummary: Cloud VoIP is often easier for small businesses to deploy and manage, while PBX can fit more specialized infrastructure needs.
bestForA: Small businesses that want simple administration and remote calling.
bestForB: Organizations with specialized infrastructure or on-premise control needs.
costConsiderations: Compare monthly user fees, setup costs, phones, taxes, integrations, support, and contract commitments.

faqs.question: Is PBX outdated?
faqs.answer: Not always. PBX-style systems can still fit organizations with specific infrastructure requirements.
